mapper.select: SELECT id, movie_id AS movieId, hall_id AS hallId, start_time AS startTime FROM movie_sessions ORDER BY start_time
SELECT id, movie_id AS movieId, hall_id AS hallId, start_time AS startTime FROM movie_sessions WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY start_time
SELECT id, movie_id AS movieId, hall_id AS hallId, start_time AS startTime FROM movie_sessions WHERE id = #{id}
